title: Associate Data Analyst
description: Monday.com is the Work OS powering over 200K teams globally. We're building the operating system for work itself—where work management, productivity, and automation converge. We're looking for talent that thrives on solving complex problems at scale.
responsibilities: Extract and analyze data from product databases to support decision-making
Create dashboards and visualizations for business stakeholders
Perform statistical analysis on user behavior and product metrics
Validate data quality and identify discrepancies
Document analytical methods and findings for reproducibility
Support A/B testing and experiment analysis

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Business, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years of data analysis, business analytics, or BI experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
